MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawford.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lisa Altamirano is present.
Attorney Gary S. Williams representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Ronald Souza, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-28-2011 is vacated.
